This page explains our approach to privacy on all our products and how it affects you.Vanilla B.V. ("Vanilla") collects some personal information for most of our products. The information we collect from analytics helps us understand what parts of our products are doing well, how people arrive at our products, and so on. Like most companies, we use this information to make our products better.

For our applications, we use device identifiers to personalise content and ads, and to analyse our traffic. We also share such identifiers and other information from your device with our advertising and analytics partners.
WebsitesFor our websites, we use cookies to personalise content and ads. We also share information about your use of our sites with our social media, advertising, and analytics partners.
